_schema_notes.mode_variants: Set mode to one of: exploration, discussion, seed_discovery, forward_evaluation, redesign_freeze, governance_review.
_schema_notes.lineage_type: Set to 'mainline' for seed_discovery, forward_evaluation, redesign_freeze, governance_review. Set to 'sandbox' for exploration, discussion.
_schema_notes.state_pack_input: null for seed_discovery and sandbox modes. Required (e.g. 'state_pack_v2') for forward_evaluation, redesign_freeze, governance_review.
_schema_notes.system_version_id: null for seed_discovery (assigned during session) and sandbox. Inherited from state pack for forward_evaluation. New version id for redesign_freeze.
_schema_notes.redesign_fields: Required for redesign_freeze mode only. Set all sub-fields to null for other modes.
_schema_notes.input_isolation_checks: For seed_discovery: list all prior artifacts confirmed absent (blind discovery). For forward_evaluation/redesign_freeze: set to [] (state pack IS a required input). For sandbox: set to [].
_schema_notes.hash_manifest_file: Set to null for governance_review mode and sandbox modes.

notes: Fill all __FILL__ fields before each execution chat. See _schema_notes for per-mode guidance.
